title: tephroseris pyrenaica
intro: Tephroseris pyrenaica, also known as Pyrenean land-cress or Pyrenees tephroseris, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tephroseris pyrenaica include its potential to treat various conditions such as respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, or consumed raw as a salad green.
